title: Swing Your Lady
writer: Joseph Schrank, Maurice Leo, Kenyon Nicholson
actors: Humphrey Bogart, Frank McHugh, Louise Fazenda
plot: Promoter Ed Hatch comes to the Ozarks with his slow-witted wrestler Joe Skopapoulos whom he pits against a hillbilly Amazon blacksmith, Sadie Horn. Joe falls in love with her and won't fight. At least not until Sadie's beau Noah s...
